core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Old World Trust' (Bank/Newspaper) with 'New World Tech' (Clean Mobile App).
Emotion First: Every element must scream 'Safety' and 'Community'.
Content is King: Copy leads the design. Typography is the interface.
Negative Space: generous padding to create a sense of calm and clarity.
anti_patterns: No strictly centered layouts for everything.
No generic stock photos of 'business handshakes'.

primary.description: Deep Emerald Green - Represents money, growth, and safety.

secondary.description: Antique Gold - Adds value, premium feel, and warmth.

background.description: Warm Stone/Paper - Feels physical and grounded, not digital.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-8 py-4 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border-2 border-stone-200 bg-transparent text-stone-800 px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-stone-100 transition-all duration-300

cards.feature: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-stone-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: rounded-lg border-stone-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all outline-none

layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Use p-24 or p-32 for section padding.
layout_strategies.border_radius: rounded-2xl for containers, rounded-full for buttons.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays (opacity 0.03) on backgrounds to give a paper feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffused ambient shadows. No harsh drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid full gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients in pale gold/green for hero backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React icons. Stroke width 1.5px. Color: Primary Green or Gold.

hero.structure: Split layout. Left: Typography + CTAs. Right: Abstract/mockup composition.
elements: Two buttons: Apple Store & Google Play

testimonials.structure: Horizontal scrolling marquee or grid of cards.
testimonials.content: Focus on stories of 'finally selling that couch' or 'buying a bike without worry'.

image_guidelines.style: Candid, warm, natural light. No studio backgrounds. Focus on the *exchange* and the *relationship*.
search_queries: person holding smartphone smiling outdoors cafe
young woman carrying box moving house smiling
image_guidelines.fallback_strategy: Use high-quality placeholders from Unsplash source URL if search tool fails: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556740758-90de374c12ad?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521791136064-7986c2920216?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80'

universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratio > 4.5:1. Use Aria labels for all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines.responsive: Mobile-first. Stack grids on mobile. Reduce font sizes by 20% on small screens.
universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add the font imports to index.css.
Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors and font families.
Create a 'components/landing' folder for section-specific components.
Ensure the 'Admin Portal' link is in the footer, discreet but accessible.
